scripts.build:pages: npm run generate:rtd-tracker && GITHUB_ACTIONS=true vite build
scripts.test:frontend: node web/tests/smoke.mjs && node web/tests/security.mjs && node web/tests/rtd-goatcounter.mjs && node web/tests/operations-ui.mjs && node web/tests/content-reduction.mjs && node web/tests/deployment.mjs && node web/tests/pdf-publish.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:build && npm run test:frontend
scripts.check:fast: bash -n scripts/*.sh && npm run check:workflows && python -m ruff check .
